card.name: Into the Dark // Out of the Dark
card.text:
Exile target nonland permanent.
---
Return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Ancient Petroglyph
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control a legendary artifact, a legendary creature, a legendary enchantment, and a legendary planeswalker, you win the game. Otherwise, draw a card.

card.name: Tysothak, Violent Inciter
card.text: Flying, trample, lifelink Whenever Tysothak, Violent Inciter deals combat damage to a player, untap each other creature you control with mana value less than or equal to the damage dealt. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: The Promise of Tomorrow
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. + {2}{G} — Distribute X +1/+1 counters among creatures you control, where X is the number of lands you control. + {2}{U}{U} — Take an extra turn after this one. Exile The Promise of Tomorrow.

card.name: Crossroads of Fate
card.text: Choose one — • Target player takes two extra turns after this one. Exile Crossroads of Fate. • You control target player during that player's next turn. Exile Crossroads of Fate.

card.name: Pillars of Conformity
card.text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player chooses a color. Until end of turn, if a permanent of than a basic land is tapped for mana, it produces one of mana of the chosen color instead of any other type and amount.

card.name: Firetop Hall
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {6}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each other Lair you control.

card.name: Impulse Amplifier
card.text: If a creature you control attacking or dealing combat damage causes a triggered ability of that creature to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Struggle Beyond Time
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal X nonland cards, where X is the number of colors mana spent to cast this spell. Exile those cards and put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Into the Silver Citadel
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card."

card.name: An Immortal Duel
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Confront an Endless Fear
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, return a creature card with the lowest mana value among creature cards in your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Arena of the Ancients
card.text: Legendary creatures don't untap during their controllers' untap steps. When Arena of the Ancients enters the battlefield, tap all legendary creatures.

card.name: Escape Portal
card.text: At the beginning of each player's end step, that player returns a nontoken creature they control with the lowest mana value to their hand.

card.name: Tragic Lyrist
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Tragic Lyrist: Return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Acolyte of All Things
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Outcast Squire
card.text: Outcast Squire gets +1/+1 as long as you control a legendary creature.

card.name: Warbringer's Vanguard
card.text: When Warbringer's Vanguard enters the battlefield, for each kind of counter on target permanent, put another counter of that kind on it or remove one from it.

card.name: Thuul's Acolyte
card.text: When Thuul's Acolyte enters the battlefield, exile up to one other target permanent you control. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Elfling Scout
card.text: When Elfling Scout enters the battlefield, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on Elfling Scout. • Return target artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Burnished Ram
card.text: Impending 3—Tap an untapped white creature you control. (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) Vigilance

card.name: Ivory Paladin
card.text: Impending 3—{W} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) When Ivory Paladin enters the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Hearthbound Sage
card.text: Vigilance When Hearthbound Sage enters the battlefield, you may have target creature you control make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than that creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: The Sisters of Prophecy
card.text: Memory {2}{W} — 2/2 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Flying

card.name: Harried by the Imps
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) + {1}{W} — Destroy target creature if it's tapped. + {B}{R} — Draw a card.

card.name: Banishment Circle
card.text: When Banishment Circle enters the battlefield, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Banishment Circle leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Legacy of Thuul
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn. • Target creature gets +1/+2 and gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Through a Sorcerous Portal
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Pious Drake of Good Omen
card.text: Flying Whenever Pious Drake of Good Omen deals combat damage to a player, search your library for a legendary permanent card with mana value less than or equal to the damage dealt, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Find Your Fate
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy all legendary creatures. • Destroy all non-legendary creatures.

card.name: Warbringer's Seraph
card.text: Flying, vigilance During your turn, Warbringer's Seraph has double strike. {BR}: Warbringer's Seraph gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Spirit Vortex
card.text: As Spirit Vortex enters the battlefield, choose a nonland permanent type. Activated abilities of permanents of the chosen type can't be activated.

card.name: Heed the Beacon's Warning
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: In Pursuit of the Warbringer
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Target player creates two 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens. + {BR} — In Pursuit of the Warbringer deals 2 damage to any target. + {1}{B}{R} — Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Paladin of Borrowed Time
card.text: Whenever Paladin of Borrowed Time enters the battlefield or attacks, you may have target creature you control make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than that creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Each creature you control with two or more counters on it has double strike.

card.name: Cleric of the Winds
card.text: During your turn, white creatures, black creatures, and red creatures you control have flying.

card.name: Roving Adventurer
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks, you may have it make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than that creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Each creature you control with a counter on it gets +1/+1.

card.name: Questing Exemplar
card.text: Whenever Questing Exemplar attacks, you may discard a card or sacrifice another artifact or creature. When you do, Questing Exemplar gains shielded until end of turn. (Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it.)

card.name: Rider on Wings of Dawn
card.text: Flying, vigilance Creatures your opponents control can't have +1/+1 counters put on them.

card.name: Motley Assemblage
card.text: During your turn, Motley Assemblage has first strike. Whenever Motley Assemblage attacks, you may remove two counters from among artifacts and creatures you control. If you do, create a 2/2 red Beast creature token that's tapped and attacking.

card.name: Legion of the Black Throne
card.text: Whenever Legion of the Black Throne attacks, you may have it make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.) When Legion of the Black Throne dies, create a number of 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens equal to its power.

card.name: Hellkite Crystalkeeper
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Hellkite Crystalkeeper attacks, you may have it make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Chaos Rover
card.text: When Chaos Rover enters the battlefield, choose one. If {B}{R} was spent to cast it, you may choose both instead. • Create a 2/2 red Beast creature token. • Put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control.

card.name: Bronze Beastman
card.text: Impending 3—{2}{W} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) When Bronze Beastman enters the battlefield, exile target creature an opponent controls until Bronze Beastman leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Iaxon's Housecarl
card.text: When Iaxon's Housecarl enters the battlefield, you may have it make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has lifelink.

card.name: A Vision of Future Triupmh
card.text: Whenever a nontoken legendary permanent enters the battlefield under your control, choose one — • Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token with lifelink. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Spectral Confrontation
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn. Each creature you control with a counter on it gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Strike Down
card.text: Destroy target creature.

card.name: Sinister Holdfast
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Sinister Holdfast: Search your library for a basic Mountain, Plains, or Island card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {R}{W}{U}, Discard Sinister Holdfast: Draw a card.

card.name: Wavesinger
card.text: When Wavesinger enters the battlefield, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Devotee of Akathax
card.text: Vigilance When Devotee of Akathax enters the battlefield, you may have it make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Iaxon's Architect
card.text: As Iaxon's Architect enters the battlefield, choose a basic land type. Lands you control are the chosen type in addition to their other types.

card.name: Benthic Guardian
card.text: Vigilance Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Benthic Guardian.

card.name: Skybound Sage
card.text: Flying Skybound Sage gets +1/+1 as long as you control a legendary creature.

card.name: Barque of Akathax
card.text: Impending 4—{1}{U} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with four time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) Flying

card.name: Resplendent Watcher
card.text: Flying When Resplendent Watcher enters the battlefield, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: On the Threshold of Time
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains shielded until end of turn. (Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it.)

card.name: Face a Raging River
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {2} — Target player draws two cards, then discards a card. + {1}{U} — Counter target spell.

card.name: Gameral's Prysight
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) + {1} — Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Vision of Another Future
card.text: Choose one — • Surveil 4, then draw two cards. (To surveil 4, look at the top four cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) • Draw three cards.

card.name: Ocean's Grip
card.text: Enchant creature When Ocean's Grip enters the battlefield, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a green Octopus creature with base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Tides of Treachery
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Return target creature to its owner's hand. + {2} — Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Skeins of Futures Past
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Target player mills four cards. + {1}{U} — Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. + {R}{G} — Draw a card.

card.name: Catch the Mist // Catch the Myth
card.text:
Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
---
Draw X cards.

card.name: Bane of Scholars
card.text: Flying, vigilance, prowess Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, you may pay {1}{RG}. When you do, Bane of Scholars fights target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Vortex Tyrant
card.text: Vortex Tyrant can't be blocked by nonlegendary creatures. Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, draw two cards.

card.name: Shared Fate
card.text: If a player would draw a card, that player exiles the top card of one of their opponents' libraries face down instead. Each player may look at cards they exiled with Shared Fate, and they may play lands and cast spells from among those cards.

card.name: Caught in the Act
card.text: Choose a color. Return all blue creatures and all creatures of the chosen color to their owners' hands.

card.name: Awoken Pteropterix
card.text: Flying Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, create a token that's a copy of Awoken Pteropterix.

card.name: Empyreoplasm
card.text: Empyreoplasm has hexproof as long as it has no counters on it and no permanents attached to it. Empyreoplasm can't be blocked.

card.name: Mirrordrake Rider
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each noncreature, nonland card in your graveyard. Flying

card.name: Azure Cloudthresher
card.text: Flying When Azure Cloudthresher enters the battlefield, search your library for a modal instant or sorcery card or a split card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Armored Daredevil
card.text: When Armored Daredevil enters the battlefield, choose one. If {R}{G} was spent to cast it, you may choose both instead. • Target creature gets -4/-0 until end of turn. • Switch target creature's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Echo of Time // Echo of Form
card.text:
Copy target instant or sorcery spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.
---
Create a token that's a copy of target artifact, creature, or land.

card.name: Brainsurge
card.text: Draw four cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

card.name: Spellgyre
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell. • Surveil 2, then draw two cards. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Cower Before the Light
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {U} — Counter target noncreature spell. + {1} — Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. + {0} — Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: To Arms // To the Winds
card.text:
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains hexproof and shielded until end of turn. (Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it.)
---
Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: Timeless Wisdom
card.text: Draw two cards. When you do, up to one target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of cards in your hand.

card.name: Legacy of Akathax
card.text: When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new modes and targets for the copy. If that spell is a split spell or a modal instant or sorcery spell, you may copy it twice instead.

card.name: Black Throne Supplicant
card.text: Whenever Black Throne Supplicant attacks, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Prodigal Heir
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, other creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Keeper of the Vault
card.text: Whenever an artifact is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Labyrinth Revenant
card.text: Menace Labyrinth Revenant gets +1/+1 as long as you control a legendary creature.

card.name: Pewter Spitewing
card.text: Impending 3—{B} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) Flying

card.name: Firetop Marauders
card.text: When Firetop Marauders enters the battlefield, choose one — • You draw a card and you lose 1 life. • Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Wilderness Rover
card.text: Menace When Wilderness Rover enters the battlefield, you may have it make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Fiend of Dark Bargains
card.text: Flying When Fiend enters the battlefield, choose one — • Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. • Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: The Lords of Mount Elsewhere
card.text: Memory {3}{B} — 3/3 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Menace

card.name: Under a Low, Cold Sun
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. • Remove up to two counters from target permanent.

card.name: Undying Malice
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it."

card.name: Breach the Unquiet Tomb
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Target player creates a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token. + {3}{B} — Destroy target creature. + {G}{W} — Draw a card.

card.name: Dungeon's Prize
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. Create a tapped Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Wrong Choice
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Exile target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Seize What Is Yours
card.text: Choose one or both — • Sacrifice an artifact. If you do, draw two cards. • Sacrifice a creature. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Scream Bloody Gore
card.text: Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control dies, each other player sacrifices a creature of their choice.

card.name: Whispers of What Once Was
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile a card at random from your graveyard. You lose life equal to its mana value. Until end of turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Fiend of Mount Elsewhere
card.text: Flying Whenever a player casts a modal spell, you draw X cards and you lose X life, where X is the number of times a mode was chosen for that spell.

card.name: Destiny, Give Me a Day
card.text: All creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn for each land you control with a basic land type.

card.name: Disciple of Hargau
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Whenever you gain life, you may pay {2}{GW}. When you do, put X +1/+1 counters on Disciple of Hargau, where X is the amount of life you gained.

card.name: Brod's Gravethief
card.text: When Brod's Gravethief enters the battlefield, exile target artifact card from your graveyard. You may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled. If you cast a spell this way, pay life equal to its mana value rather than pay its mana cost.

card.name: Chaos Armor
card.text: Flying Whenever Chaos Armor enters the battlefield or attacks, draw a card. Then you lose 1 life unless you control a green permanent, and you lose 1 life unless you control a white permanent.

card.name: Ebony-Bone Maquette
card.text: Impending 2—{4}{B} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with two time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) When Ebony-Bone Maquette enters the battlefield, each player sacrifices a creature of their choice.

card.name: Young Necromancer
card.text: When Young Necromancer enters the battlefield, you may exile two cards from your graveyard. When you do, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Tempting Fiend
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Moldering Gentry
card.text: When Moldering Gentry enters the battlefield, choose one — • You may have Moldering Gentry make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.) • Remove up to three counters from target permanent.

card.name: Sandstone Savage
card.text: Impending 2—{1}{B} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with two time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) You may cast Sandstone Savage from your graveyard for its impending cost.

card.name: Dark Summoner
card.text: When Dark Summoner enters the battlefield, choose one. If {G}{W} was spent to cast it, you may choose both instead. • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. • Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a creature card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Pestilent Haze
card.text: Choose one — • All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. • Remove two loyalty counters from each planeswalker.

card.name: Make Demands
card.text: Search your library for two cards, put one of them into your hand, one of them into your graveyard, then shuffle.

card.name: Eerie Monolith
card.text: {B}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact or creature: You gain 1 life and draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Deadly Derision
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Ignominious End
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Ritual of New Life
card.text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Foolhardy Adventurer
card.text: Haste Foolhardy Adventurer gets +1/+1 as long as you control a legendary creature.

card.name: Copper Cavalier
card.text: Impending 5—{B} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with five time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) When Copper Cavalier enters the battlefield, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Dragontamer Apprentice
card.text: When Dragontamer Apprentice enters the battlefield, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Hate-Dreamer's Thrall
card.text: {1}{R}: Hate-Dreamer's Thrall makes an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Familiar of Zuvas
card.text: Noncreature spells you cast cost {R} (or {1}) less to cast.

card.name: Wrathful Ignificus
card.text: When Wrathful Ignificus enters the battlefield, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on Wrathful Ignificus. • Wrathful Ignificus gains haste and menace until end of turn.

card.name: Bifurcated Brute
card.text: Menace When Bifurcated Brute enters the battlefield, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on Bifurcated Brute. • Target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Citadel Deathweb
card.text: Reach, trample

card.name: The Scourge of Man
card.text: Memory {2}{R} — 3/2 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Trample, reach

card.name: Charge Over // Charge Past
card.text:
Charge Over deals 2 damage to any target.
---
Up to three target creatures can't block this turn.

card.name: Under Death's Hollow Gaze
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. + {1}{R} — Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. + {W}{U} — Draw a card.

card.name: Urgent Preparation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Deep in the Ancient Mines
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {2} — Deep in the Ancient Mines deals 3 damage to any target. + {2} — Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Iaxon's Wrath
card.text: Choose one — • Iaxon's Wrath deals 4 damage to target creature or battle. • Iaxon's Wrath deals 6 damage to target planeswalker.

card.name: Confront the Acid-Wyrm
card.text: Confront the Acid-Wyrm deals 6 damage to target creature, planeswalker, or battle. Up to one target creature you control makes an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than that creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Cruel Incinerator
card.text: Flying, trample Whenever Cruel Incinerator deals combat damage to a player, you may have it make an experience check. When you put a counter on Cruel Incinerator this way, it deals damage equal to its power to each creature and planeswalker that player controls. (To make a successful experience check, exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Caught in the Hate-Dream
card.text: Choose one or more — • Caught in the Hate-Dream deals 3 damage to each creature. • Caught in the Hate-Dream deals 3 damage to each planeswalker. • Caught in the Hate-Dream deals 3 damage to each battle.

card.name: Slumbering Dragon
card.text: Flying Slumbering Dragon can't attack or block unless it has five or more +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever a creature attacks you or a planeswalker you control, put a +1/+1 counter on Slumbering Dragon.

card.name: Ornery Boglim
card.text: Ornery Boglim can't attack or block unless you've cast a noncreature spell this turn.

card.name: Firetop Scavenger
card.text: Haste Whenever Firetop Scavenger attacks, you may pay {WU}. When you do, tap target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Decree of the Boglim King
card.text: Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on a red creature you control, a +1/+1 counter on a white creature you control, and a +1/+1 counter on a blue creature you control.

card.name: Archfiend's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to any other target. • Each of up to two target creatures gain double strike until end of turn. • Discard your hand, then draw three cards.

card.name: Diviner of Zuvas
card.text: Whenever Diviner of Zuvas deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of your library. When you do, choose one — • You may play that card this turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on Diviner of Zuvas.

card.name: From the Hellkite's Nest
card.text: Until end of turn, each of up to two target creatures you control become red Dragons with base power and toughness 4/4 and gain flying.

card.name: Black Throne Marauders
card.text: Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, Black Throne Marauders gains trample and haste until end of turn. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, Black Throne Marauders gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Slavering Gargant
card.text: Menace {2}, Discard Slavering Gargant: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Boglim Warband
card.text: When Boglim Warband enters the battlefield or attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Elven Bloodwitch
card.text: When Elven Bloodwitch enters the battlefield, choose one. If {W}{U} was spent to cast it, you may choose both instead. • Create two 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens. • Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Burning Intrigue
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Inexorable Horde
card.text: When Inexorable Horde enters the battlefield, you may discard a nonland card. If you do, draw a card. Whenever you discard one or more cards, put that many +1/+1 counters on Inexorable Horde.

card.name: Fury of the Hate-Dreamer
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it. Fury of the Hate-Dreamer deals 2 damage to each creature and each planeswalker. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Vision of Akathax
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: Khulut's Wrath
card.text: Khulut's Wrath deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Horde's Rage // Horde's Rebellion
card.text:
Horde's Rage deals 4 damage to target creature, planeswalker, or battle.
---
Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Placid Seraphrog
card.text: Reach {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}: Placid Seraphrog gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Priest of Brod
card.text: {2}{G}: Priest of Brod gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Autumnal Steed
card.text: Trample When Autumnal Steed enters the battlefield, choose one — • You may put a basic land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. • Put a +1/+1 counter on Autumnal Steed.

card.name: Orc Warband
card.text: Trample

card.name: Savage Rabble
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash by tapping two untapped artifacts you control as an additional cost to cast it.

card.name: Ycct's Chamberlain
card.text: When Ycct's Chamberlain enters the battlefield, choose one — • Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") • You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Thuul's Scavengers
card.text: When Thuul's Scavengers enters the battlefield, choose creature or land, then reveal the top three cards of your library. Put all cards of the chosen type revealed this way into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Triumphant Brute
card.text: Triumphant Brute gets +1/+1 as long as you control a legendary creature.

card.name: Thogagog the Conjured
card.text: Memory {1}{G} — 2/2 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Trample

card.name: Taxidermied Necroghast
card.text: Impending 7—{G} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with seven time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.)

card.name: Forceful Interruption
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to another target creature, planeswalker, or battle.

card.name: Dragon's Vengeance
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage to equal to its power to another target creature. • Dragon's Vengeance deals 4 damage to target creature with flying.

card.name: Quest into Exotic Lands
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. + {1} — Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. + {U}{B} — Draw a card.

card.name: Splendor of Ancient Days
card.text: Enchant land When Splendor of Ancient Days enters the battlefield, draw a card. Enchanted land has "{T}: Create a Treasure token." (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Awaiting the Rightful Heir
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Mill three cards. + {G} — You may return a creature card from your graveyard to your hand. + {G} — You may return a land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Everything, Protean Clay
card.text: Whenever Everything, Protean Clay enters the battlefield or attacks, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {X}, Exile a creature card with mana value X or less from a graveyard: Everything becomes a copy of the exiled card, except it's still legendary and has this ability. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Hyperboria
card.text: At the beginning of each opponent's end step, if that player didn't attack, cast a spell, or put a nontoken permanent onto the battlefield this turn, you draw a card and create a 2/2 red Beast creature token.

card.name: Metamorphosis
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Add X mana of any one color, where X is 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells.

card.name: Ravenous Viashino
card.text: Trample Each creature you control with toughness greater than its power assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power. {1}{UB}: Ravenous Viashino gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Thogagog's Reaver
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever you cast a blue spell or a black spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Thogagog's Reaver.

card.name: Chaos Exemplar
card.text: Vigilance, reach, deathtouch

card.name: World Reaver
card.text: When World Reaver enters the battlefield, if it was cast, choose one — • Destroy target nonbasic land. • Search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Mossborn Dead
card.text: Whenever Mossborn Dead deals combat damage to a player, put that many +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Magic Mushroom
card.text: When Magic Mushroom enters the battlefield, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") Whenever an artifact you control enters the battlefield, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Nachtwood Outcast
card.text: Vigilance, trample, reach Narrative — Whenever you cast a split or modal instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Nachtwood Outcast.

card.name: Gateway Lich
card.text: Gateway Lich can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. When Gateway Lich enters the battlefield, look at target player's hand. You may put a land card from it onto the battlefield tapped under your control.

card.name: Ycct's Legion
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {G} — Create a 3/3 green Soom creature token. + {1}{G} — Create a 3/3 green Soom creature token. + {2}{G} — Create a 3/3 green Soom creature token.

card.name: Bonegrove Nurturer
card.text: When Bonegrove Nurturer enters the battlefield, choose one. If {U}{B} was spent to cast it, you may choose both instead. • You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. • Put a +1/+1 counter on Bonegrove Nurturer.

card.name: Catch the Falling Light
card.text: Distribute four +1/+1 counters among up to four target creatures you control. Creatures you control gain vigilance and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Confront the Duskprowler
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to each of two other target creatures.

card.name: Legacy of Ancient Power
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Destroy target artifact. + {1} — Destroy target enchantment. + {2}{G} — Destroy target land.

card.name: Ancient Power
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, if 5 or more mana was spent to cast it, draw a card.

card.name: Yiven the Illustrated
card.text: Vigilance If you would lose unspent green or blue mana, that mana becomes colorless instead. {T}: Add {G}{U}.

card.name: Gulp
card.text: Exile target permanent.

card.name: Grith, a Dying Breed
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets only a single creature you control, you may pay {3}. If you do, copy that spell for each other permanent the spell could target. Each copy targets a different one of those permanents.

card.name: Soul Parry
card.text: Counter target spell. When you do, Soul Parry deals damage equal to that spell's mana value to up to one target creature, planeswalker, or battle.

card.name: Tyrant's Prize
card.text: You can't cast this spell during the first four turns of the game. Return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Fervent Charge
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Overwhelming Force
card.text: Creatures you control get +X/+X, where X is the total amount of mana you've spent to cast spells this turn.

card.name: Shrine to Yesterday
card.text: Whenever Shrine to Yesterday or another artifact enters the battlefield under your control, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {T}, Tap two untapped artifacts you control: Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Kuwal, Mirror-Blessed
card.text: During your turn Kuwal, Mirror-Blessed has double strike. Whenever a creature dies, if its power was greater than Kuwal's power, put a +1/+1 counter on Kuwal.

card.name: Kulk, Born of Dragonblood
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may have Kulk, Born of Dragonblood become an X/X Dragon creature with flying until end of turn, where X is the greatest mana value among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Into Glory // Into Despair
card.text:
Create two 1/1 white Warrior creature tokens. Until end of turn, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance and haste.
---
Counter target noncreature spell. Into Despair deals 2 damage to that spell's controller.

card.name: Twin Tusks of Gunragao
card.text: At the beginning of each end step, if you've spent X or more total mana this turn, where X is Twin Tusks of Gunragao's power, put a +1/+1 counter on Twin Tusks of Gunragao and draw a card.

card.name: Opportunistic Warband
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Whenever you put one or more counters on another permanent you control, Opportunistic Warband deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Iaxon's Blessing
card.text: Choose one — • Draw two cards. • When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new modes and targets for the copy. • Return target card not named Iaxon's Blessing from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Skolk the Dragonraiser
card.text: When Skolk the Dragonraiser enters the battlefield, return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a gold counter on it. It's an artifact in addition to its other types.

card.name: Bronze Seraph
card.text: Impending 3—{W}{B} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) Flying, lifelink

card.name: Prophecy Stone
card.text: When Prophecy Stone enters the battlefield and whenever you cast an artifact spell, choose one — • Create a 1/1 black Skeleton creature token. • Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Akathax's Siren
card.text: When Akathax's Siren enters the battlefield, draw a card. {T}: Add {G}{U}. Spend this mana only to cast modal spells or pay spree costs.

card.name: Brave Charge // Craven Ambush
card.text:
Brave Charge deals 2 damage to target creature, planeswalker, or battle. Draw a card.
---
Draw two cards. Then you may discard a nonland card. When you do, Craven Ambush deals 4 damage to target player.

card.name: Looming Spires // Looming Spooks
card.text:
You gain 2 life. Then you may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards
---
Create two 2/2 red Beast creature tokens.

card.name: Bestial Guardian
card.text: When Bestial Guardian enters the battlefield, you may exile a card from your graveyard. When you do, Bestial Guardian deals X damage divided as you choose between up to one target creature and up to one target planeswalker or battle, where X is the exiled card's mana value.

card.name: Consult the Mirrorhall
card.text: Whenever you tap a permanent for mana, you may pay 1 life. If you do, add {C}.

card.name: Necromantic Paladin
card.text: Menace Whenever Necromantic Paladin attacks, draw a card, then discard a card. When you do, you may have Necromantic Paladin make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Reaver of the Dragon
card.text: Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, reveal the top three cards of your library. You may put a land card from among them onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't, put a nonland card from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Wight Regent
card.text: Menace, lifelink Whenever a nontoken artifact enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on Wight Regent and draw a card.

card.name: Black Throne Revenant
card.text: Lifelink {T}, Remove a counter from an artifact or creature you control: You draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Infernal Custodian
card.text: Flying When Infernal Custodian enters the battlefield, choose one — • Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. • Sacrifice an artifact. When you do, draw a card.

card.name: Into the Wyvern's Lair
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Until end of turn, whenever a creature enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card. + {1} — Create a 3/3 green Soom creature token. + {G}{U} — Create a token that's a copy of a creature you control.

card.name: Brash Moonreader
card.text: {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, untap Brash Moonreader.

card.name: Wyrmslayer Mage
card.text: Haste Whenever Wyrmslayer Mage deals combat damage to a player, you may have it make an experience check. (Exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than this creature's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Wandering Mage
card.text: When Wandering Mage enters the battlefield or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Equine Raider
card.text: When Equine Raider enters the battlefield, choose one. Choose both instead if three or more colors of mana were spent to cast it. • Put a +1/+1 counter on Equine Raider. • Put a menace counter on Equine Raider.

card.name: Go Forth Into Glory
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1}: Draw a card. + {1}: Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") + {6}: Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Exotic Altar
card.text: When Exotic Altar enters the battlefield, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Wayfinder's Sword
card.text: Equipped creature has vigilance and "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Equip {1}

card.name: Emissary of Hatred
card.text: Whenever one or more counters are put on a creature you control not named Emissary of Hatred, put a +1/+1 counter on Emissary of Hatred.

card.name: Icon of Gilt Ivory
card.text: Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Artificer's Skelemental
card.text: Impending 4—{3} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with four time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.) Flying {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Luminous Boongiver
card.text: Flying Whenever Luminous Boongiver enters the battlefield or attacks, choose one — • Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) • Put target card in a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: All-Fates Scroll
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {7}, {T}, Sacrifice All-Fates Scroll: Draw X cards, where X is the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: History's Bones
card.text: As History's Bones enters the battlefield, choose a nonland card name, then exile all cards in graveyards with the chosen name. Spells with the chosen name can't be cast. If a card with the chosen name would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

card.name: Electrum Greatsword
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each of its colors and has "{T}: Add one mana of each of this creature's colors." Equip {3}

card.name: From the Depths of the Dark
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Create a tapped colorless land token named Everywhere that is every basic land type. + {3} — Create a token that's a copy of a permanent you control, except it's not legendary.

card.name: Ancient Bough
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}: Ancient Bough becomes a 1/1 Dryad creature type until end of turn. You may have it make an experience check. Activate only as a sorcery. (To make a successful experience check, exile a card from your graveyard with mana value greater than Ancient Bough's power to put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Shores of Potential
card.text: Shores of Potential enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Shores of Potential: Search your library for two basic land cards with different names, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: King of the Black Throne (bundle promo)
card.text: Creatures you control attacking cause abilities of permanents you control to trigger as though those creatures entered the battlefield.

card.name: Crossroads of Fate (headliner promo)
card.text: Choose one — • Target player takes two extra turns after this one. Exile Crossroads of Fate. • You control target player during that player's next turn. Exile Crossroads of Fate.

card.name: FYF Draft Archetypes FYF
card.text: {W}{B} IMPENDING WIll you cast your creatures early and wait for their arrival? {B}{G} ARTIFACTS Will your trinkets help you out-grind your foes? {G}{U} SPREE Will your mana ramp help you add to your spells' effects? {U}{R} NARRATIVE Will your modal spells be rewarded twofold? {R}{W} +1/+1 COUNTERS Will experience help strengthen your creatures? {W}{B}{R} COUNTERS Whether experience or impending, will your creatures' counters lend you glory? {U}{R}{G} NARRATIVE Ramp into big spells with many choices—But will you make the right call? {B}{G}{W} ARTIFACTS Will triumph and treasure come your way? {R}{W}{U} GRAVEYARD Experience, split cards, modal costs—Will all paths reward you for expensive spells in your graveyard? {G}{U}{B} BIG MANA Artifacts, ramp, and big spree payoffs—Can you contain the might of Yor-Om's mana?

card.name: Memory FYF
card.text: You can mark a nonlegendary creature cast for its memory cost with this reminder card.

card.name: Jusra, Savage Gothique
card.text: Memory {2} — 1/1 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) When Jusra, Savage Gothique enters the battlefield, create a tapped Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Karnath, War Eternal
card.text: Memory {1}{W} — 1/1 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Double strike

card.name: Katheon Blackhorn
card.text: Memory {1}{R}{R} — 2/3 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Whenever Katheon Blackhorn deals combat damage to a player, discard your hand, then draw that many cards.

card.name: Old One-Eye
card.text: Memory {1}{U} — 1/1 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Whenever Old One-Eye attacks, tap target creature defending player controls, then put a number of stun counters on it equal to Old One-Eye's power.

card.name: Glaiston, Dagger-Tongue
card.text: Memory {1}{G}{G} — 2/2 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) When Glaiston, Dagger-Tongue enters the battlefield, if it was cast, choose target nonland permanent. If it's an artifact or enchantment, or if Glaiston is legendary, exile that permanent.

card.name: Brrth, the Risible Tide
card.text: Memory {1}{B} — 1/1 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Flying, deathtouch, lifelink

card.name: Iridescent Babaluma
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) You may cast blue spells, red spells, and green spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Gameral, the Lightbender
card.text: Memory {1}{U} — 2/1 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) Whenever Gameral, the Lightbender deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Then discard a card unless Gameral is legendary

card.name: Akathax, Sage Immortal
card.text: Your maximum hand size is two. Whenever you cast a spell or whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card.

card.name: Khulut the Warbringer
card.text: Flying, menace, haste If another creature you control with flying, menace, or haste would deal damage, it deals double that damage instead. If that creature has flying, menace, and haste, it deals three times that damage instead.

card.name: King of the Black Throne
card.text: Creatures you control attacking cause abilities of permanents you control to trigger as though those creatures entered the battlefield.

card.name: Zuvas, Hate-Dreamer
card.text: During your turn, Zuvas, Hate-Dreamer has hexproof. Whenever Zuvas attacks, create an X/X red and white Elemental creature token with trample and lifelink that's tapped and attacking, where X is the number of attacking creatures.

card.name: Ycct, Savage Naturalist
card.text: Whenever Ycct, Savage Naturalist deals combat damage to a player, destroy each artifact, battle, enchantment, and planeswalker.

card.name: Eternal Battlefield
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) Eternal Battlefield enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a basic Plains.

card.name: Sheltered Hamlet
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) Sheltered Hamlet enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a basic Swamp.

card.name: Mastermind's Castle
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) Mastermind's Castle enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a basic Mountain.

card.name: Gnarled Monument
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) Gnarled Monument enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a basic Forest.

card.name: Citadel of Might
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) Citadel of Might enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a basic Island.

card.name: Plundered Splendor
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Plundered Splendor: Search your library for a basic Forest, Island, or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {G}{U}{B}, Discard Plundered Splendor: Draw a card.

card.name: Haunted Manse
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Haunted Manse: Search your library for a basic Swamp, Forest, or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {W}{B}{R}, Discard Haunted Manse: Draw a card.

card.name: Imposing Manor
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Imposing Manor: Search your library for a basic Island, Mountain, or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {U}{R}{G}, Discard Imposing Manor: Draw a card.

card.name: Moldering Vestry
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Moldering Vestry: Search your library for a basic Plains, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {B}{G}{W}, Discard Moldering Vestry: Draw a card.

card.name: Dawnbringer Cleric
card.text: When Dawnbringer Cleric enters the battlefield, choose one — • You gain 2 life. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Sunlit Marsh
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) Sunlit Marsh enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Haunted Mire
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) Haunted Mire enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Tangled Islet
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) Tangled Islet enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Molten Tributary
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) Molten Tributary enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Sacred Peaks
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) Sacred Peaks enters the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Elemental FYF
card.text: Trample, lifelink

card.name: Diverging Predator
card.text: Trample Diverging Predator enters the battlefield with two +1/+1 counters on it. Narrative — Whenever you cast a modal or split instant or sorcery spell, double the number of +1/+1 counters on Diverging Predator.

card.name: Everywhere FYF
card.text: This land is a Plains, Island, Swamp, Mountain, and Forest. ({T}: Add {W}, {U}, {B}, {R}, or {G}.)

card.name: Treasure FYF
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Remnants of the Architect
card.text: Search your library for two creature cards with different names, exile them, then shuffle. When you do, target opponent chooses one of the exiled cards. Put the chosen card into your graveyard and the other into your hand.

card.name: To Outwit the Sage Immortal
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Draw two cards. + {RG} — Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.") + {R}{G} — For each artifact you control, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: The Black Throne Sits Empty
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Search your library for a card, put it into your graveyard, then shuffle. + {GW} — Each player sacrifices an artifact or enchantment of their choice. + {G}{W} — Return up to three nonland permanent cards with total mana value 4 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Visions of the Hate-Dreamer
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {2} — Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. + {WU} — Put a flying counter on a creature you control. + {2}{W}{U} — Untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: The Savagery of the Soom
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {2} — Create a 3/3 green Soom creature token. + {UB} — Surveil 2. + {1}{U}{B} — Choose a creature on the battlefield or a creature card in a graveyard. Until end of turn, each creature you control becomes a copy of the chosen creature.

card.name: Arms of the Gorgon
card.text: {T}, Tap an untapped creature you control: Target player mills cards equal to the tapped creature's power.

card.name: Wavebender
card.text: Flash When Wavebender enters the battlefield, choose one — • Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. It loses all abilities until your next turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Soldier FYF
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Oggogg, the Gods' Fist
card.text: Memory {1}{G}{G} — 2/2 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) When Oggogg, the Gods' Fist enters the battlefield, or whenever it attacks while legendary, you may search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Urgrell, Wight Lord
card.text: Memory {4}{W} — 2/2 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) When Urgrell, Wight Lord enters the battlefield, or whenever it attacks while legendary, return target artifact card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Krelmar, Necrosavant
card.text: Memory {2}{B}{B} — 3/2 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) When Krelmar, Necrosavant enters the battlefield, or whenever it attacks while legendary, target creature an opponent controls gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is Krelmar's power.

card.name: Sithera, the Burning Gyre
card.text: Memory {1}{R}{R} — 2/1 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) When Sithera, the Burning Gyre enters the battlefield, or whenever it attacks while legendary, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell this way, copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: The Empty Paladin
card.text: Memory {1}{U}{U} — 2/2 (If you cast this for its memory cost, it's not legendary, and has a different power and toughness.) When The Empty Paladin enters the battlefield, or whenever it attacks while legendary, draw two cards, then discard a card.
